title: Dutchie Dispensary Menu Scraper
description:
Extract complete product menus from any Dutchie.com dispensary in under 60 seconds. Returns clean, structured data: product names, brands, THC/CBD percentages, pricing, weight, and stock status.

Quick Start: Paste a Dutchie dispensary URL below and click Run.

scrapingMode.title: Scraping Mode
scrapingMode.description: Select 'Single Store' for a quick 30-second scrape of one dispensary, or 'Bulk Stores' to process multiple URLs in one run.
enumTitles: Single Store — Scrape one dispensary (~30 seconds)
Bulk Stores — Scrape multiple dispensaries in one run
scrapingMode.sectionDescription: Choose how many dispensaries to scrape and paste their Dutchie URLs below.

startUrls.title: Dispensary URLs
startUrls.description: Enter one or more Dutchie.com dispensary menu URLs. In Single Store mode, only the first URL is used. Example: https://dutchie.com/dispensary/your-store-name

maxItems.title: Max Products per Store
maxItems.description: Limit the number of products extracted per dispensary. Set to 0 for unlimited (full menu). Start with 10 to preview results and control costs.
maxItems.sectionDescription: Fine-tune how much data is extracted and how it is filtered.

categoryFilter.title: Category Filter
categoryFilter.description: Optional: Only extract products from a specific category (e.g., 'Flower', 'Edible', 'Vape', 'Pre-Roll', 'Concentrate'). Leave blank to extract the full menu.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Enable Apify's proxy service for IP rotation. Recommended if you experience 403 errors or are scraping many stores in bulk mode.
useProxy.sectionDescription: Proxy and network configuration. Most users can leave these at their defaults.

proxyGroup.title: Proxy Group
proxyGroup.description: Which Apify proxy group to use. Residential is recommended for best reliability.
